ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle */,
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drive train configuration */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "trim" TEXT /* Specific trim level of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "invoice_price" TEXT /* Invoice price to dealers */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "mpg_city" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_highway" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "wheelbase" INTEGER /* Wheelbase in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "color" TEXT /* Exterior color of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "options" TEXT /* Additional options or features installed in the vehicle */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was produced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_train_id") REFERENCES drive_trains ("drive_train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle manufacturer */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_makes_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "start_production_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started being produced */,
  "end_production_year" INTEGER /* Year the model stopped being produced */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the vehicle is produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_trains" (
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive train configuration */,
  "drive_train_name" TEXT /* Name of the drive train configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the drive train configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the dealership */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the dealership manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dealership manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the dealership manager */,
  "open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock level was last updated */,
  "reserved_units" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles reserved but not yet sold */,
  "available_units" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles available for immediate sale */,
  "last_sold_price" TEXT /* The last price at which a vehicle of this type was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventory_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)
